title: schoenus axillaris
intro: Schoenus axillaris, also known as the marsh club-rush or marsh sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus axillaris include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, to be used for its medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
